format:
(UINT16) Length of Slot Info

Slot Info:
(UINT8) Player number
(UINT8) Download status
(UINT8) Slot status
(UINT8) Computer status
(UINT8) Team
(UINT8) Color
(UINT8) Race
(UINT8) Computer type
(UINT8) Handicap
remarks_html:
This is sent for slot updates.

The length of slot info should always be 0x0B.
